channel.title: Just Another Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Just Another Blog

item.title: Tree Traversals
item.description: Depth-First Search a. Pre-order traversal b. Post-order traversal c. Inorder traversal Traversing a tree involves iterating over its node in some order. I’m covering the DFS and BFS traversals. Depth-First Search a. Pre-order traversal ┌───4───┐ ┌─2─┐ ┌─6 1 3 5 4, 2, 1, 3, 6, 5 Visit the current node Recursively visit the left node.
